title: RawEvent
description: A single analytics event on the raw-events Kafka topic.

event_id.description: UUID v7 uniquely identifying this event.

site_id.description: Identifier of the site that produced the event; used as the Kafka message key.

event_type.description: Type of event (e.g. page_view, click, custom).

timestamp.description: Client-side event timestamp in milliseconds since Unix epoch.

url.description: Full URL of the page where the event occurred.

referrer.description: HTTP Referer header value; empty string if none.

session_context.description: Browser/device context collected at the time of the event.

properties.description: Arbitrary custom properties attached to the event.

server_timestamp.description: Server-side ingestion timestamp in milliseconds since Unix epoch.

ip.description: Client IP address as seen by the ingest server.

user_agent.description: Raw User-Agent string from the HTTP request.
